issues.description: Action type is SearchDeck but effect searches from trash, not deck. Should be a trash-specific action or custom logic.
Filter missing color constraint. Effect requires 'black Character card' but filter only specifies cost. Must include color:'Black' and type:'Character'.
Effect does not model the cost/activation requirements: resting this Character and 1 other Character to pay for the ability. This is a payment condition that should be represented.
Effect allows 'up to 1' card (optional) but DSL action does not reflect optionality. Should include a count/limit parameter indicating 0-1 cards.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Activate: Main] ➀ (You may rest the specified number of DON!! cards in your cost area.) You may rest this Character and 1 of your Characters: Add up to 1 black Character card with a cost of 1 from your trash to your hand.
